evidence.assessment: The exploratory step 'Validate persona scenario #1' is blocked because the necessary LLM evaluation call failed, preventing any conclusive scoring of the scenario. Without the LLM assessment, it is impossible to determine if the expected result of confirming scenario behavior or producing a failure report was achieved. This lack of evaluative evidence leads to an inconclusive status.
